description: A purple car and a green car are driving on a road. The purple car is driving on the left side of the road while the green car is driving on the right side of the road. The purple car is driving faster than the green car.

A purple car drives through an intersection, followed by a green car, a red car, and a red truck. The vehicles navigate the intersection, with the red truck turning left and the red car turning right.
setting: urban intersection with road markings and traffic signs

description: A yellow school bus drives through an intersection while other vehicles are present.
setting: urban intersection with traffic lights and road markings

description: Two cars approach a four-way intersection, one from the left and one from the right. The car from the right turns left, while the car from the left turns right, resulting in a collision at the intersection.
setting: urban intersection with road markings and traffic signs

description: Three cars are driving around a roundabout. A purple car enters the roundabout and drives around the other two cars. The purple car then exits the roundabout.
A red car, a yellow car, and a purple car are driving in a roundabout. A fire truck enters the roundabout and stops behind the purple car.
setting: urban roundabout with trees and street signs
